calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify And Terminate Testamentary Trust
Off Calendar Feb-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robin Pulich for (petitioners) Russell Anderson, Patricia Harvey & Bruce Anderson.

The Court confirmed that there has been no opposition and asked if counsel had additional argument. Ms. Pulich stated that they had cited everything in their points and authorities, that the additional information is that the amounts paid to the beneficiaries is down from previous years, that the payout is $150.00 to $250.00 for each beneficiary, that the payout is so low it is meaningless, that all of the beneficiaries have signed consents and that Ms. Pulich has represented the family for 30 years. The Court granted the petition to modify and terminate the testamentary trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Mayo. (Not Reported)
